title: How We Sleep
description: Making the place you sleep more decorative
body:
![How We Sleep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83074619176cc0ef867129a3953c5fcb4198c1e6_0.webp)
 

How we sleep is a decoration mod, just like you can in the sims we are slowly adding fun
designs to Minecraft to make better living space, in this case we are updating the bedrooms
 
We are making the Bedroom a much more welcoming place in your Minecraft builds, we have added many blocks to enjoy but these can be used for any room, check our screen shots out, we have log houses examples, room examples and general images of how to use our tricks with item frames with throw the wall headboards.


<details>
<summary>How to use</summary>

to open the cot sides from 1.0.0.5 you shift + right click the shift key can be changed in the key bindings

To stop cot sides been open from 1.0.0.5 create the Lock A Cot key and shift click on the cot sids and headboards, this does not use a keybinding, this is becasue the cot sides have a right click function already so they key must use shit, this might change in the future,
</details>


![Image in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45c26f56e259e6f049996da438b028386e461cfa_0.webp)

**All recipes can be found in JEI or mods like this.**
 


![LittleRedRidingSim's Avatar](https://static-cdn.jtvnw.net/jtv_user_pictures/f4d004de-890e-4457-b447-260824bda943-profile_image-150x150.png)
Our children's bedroom sets are based off [LittleRedRidingSim's](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/littleredridingsim/projects) great designs with permission, thanks Little Red, your Sims mods really helped us with our Minecraft mod.
 


### Our Social Media:

### Supporting The Mods?
Would you like to support us? consider our patreon, to help keep our lights on and our tummies full. [https://www.patreon.com/TSMUK](https://www.patreon.com/TSMUK) thanks guys, if you make videos and love our mods, consider making a review video, can't do these two things? then simple, Follow us on twitter, and comment on this page to tell us what you like and dislike about our work.

Most importantly **ENJOY** yourself.
